products.name: Fusion Reflex IM
products.descriptor: Multirotor flight controller introductory model with modular Rust-based software

evidence.snippet: Today is a huge milestone for Fusion Engineering. We are proud to announce the release of our first flight controller: Fusion Reflex Introductory Model (or in short, Fusion Reflex IM.)

We got a lot of great responses to our first product release, which we are very thankful for. With our Fusion Reflex IM being released, the first IM’s are currently being shipped to our development partners. Integration will start soon; exciting times!

products.name: Fusion Reflex
products.descriptor: Multirotor drone flight controller product line with INDI-based control

evidence.snippet: Today is a huge milestone for Fusion Engineering. We are proud to announce the release of our first flight controller: Fusion Reflex Introductory Model (or in short, Fusion Reflex IM.)

unresolved_questions: The dedicated product page https://fusion.engineering/reflex-im was not fetched (skipped_class_budget); it would confirm full specs, pricing, and readiness details for the Fusion Reflex IM.
The order page https://fusion.engineering/reflex-im-order-page was not fetched; it would clarify whether the IM is available as a standard catalog purchase vs. development-partner-only.
The page https://fusion.engineering/reflex-new-look was not fetched; it may describe a successor or updated version of the Fusion Reflex beyond the IM, which could represent an additional SKU.
